en_title: Planet Zoo 2 Coming This Year, Featuring Flying and Aquatic Animals
cn_title: 《动物园之星2》年内推出,新增飞行与水生动物

paragraphs.en: The cod game you didn't expect.
paragraphs.cn: 一款你没想到会有的鳕鱼模拟。

paragraphs.en: Frontier Developments has announced Planet Zoo 2, which will include flying and aquatic animals in aviaries and aquariums for the first time.
paragraphs.cn: Frontier Developments正式公布《动物园之星2》(Planet Zoo 2),系列首次加入飞行禽类和水生动物,玩家可以建造完整的鸟舍和水族馆。

paragraphs.en: This zoo sim sequel will arrive for PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S on October 13, almost seven years after the park gates opened on Frontier's first Planet Zoo.
paragraphs.cn: 这部动物园模拟续作将于10月13日登陆PC、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X/S,距离Frontier首部《动物园之星》开门迎客已过去近七年。

paragraphs.en: Announcing Planet Zoo 2 today, Frontier dubbed the game as a "generational leap forward in animation and animal behaviour", with improved visuals and a wider gameplay focus on conservation — restoring natural habitats and releasing animals into wildlife reserves.
paragraphs.cn: Frontier今日在公布《动物园之星2》时,称本作在「动画和动物行为上是跨世代的飞跃」,视觉表现大幅升级,玩法上更加聚焦保育主题——玩家可以修复自然栖息地,把动物放归野生保护区。

paragraphs.en: New aquatic species include black-tipped reef sharks, hawksbill turtles, and colourful shoals of fish, while bird species will meanwhile feature the toco toucan and the secretary bird.
paragraphs.cn: 本作新增的水生物种包括黑鳍礁鲨、玳瑁海龟、各色鱼群,鸟类则有托哥巨嘴鸟(Toco Toucan)和蛇鹫(Secretary Bird)等。

paragraphs.en: As ever, you'll also be having to balance the various needs of running a successful animal park — making sure your guests and staff are happy, as well as the animals, and also ensuring you're making enough cash to keep the lights on.
paragraphs.cn: 与前作一样,玩家依然需要平衡运营动物园的各种需求——既要让游客、员工和动物三方都满意,也要保证收入足够维持运营。

paragraphs.en: Speaking of money, Planet Zoo will launch at $49.99/£39.99/€49.99, and pre-orders are open now. There's a set of pre-order bonuses (you'll get the Toucan Eat Shop and Signage, three Unique Animal Donation Bins, and the Tiger Photo Stand-In Wall when the game launches) and also a Deluxe Edition option.
paragraphs.cn: 说到价格,《动物园之星2》将以49.99美元(约合人民币358元)/39.99英镑/49.99欧元发售,预购现已开放。预购奖励包括「巨嘴鸟便利店」皮肤、三个独特动物捐款箱和「老虎合影墙」(发售时一并解锁),还有豪华版可选。

paragraphs.en: Planet Zoo 2's pricier version will cost $64.99/£54.99/€64.99 and feature six additional animal species — details of which are still to be announced. A Deluxe Edition upgrade pack will also be available, should you want to wait and see.
paragraphs.cn: 豪华版定价64.99美元(约合人民币465元)/54.99英镑/64.99欧元,额外包含6种新动物物种,具体名单尚未公布。如果想再观望一下,后续也会单独推出豪华版升级包。

opus_summary: Frontier公布《动物园之星2》,10月13日登陆PC/PS5/Xbox Series X/S,系列首次加入飞行和水生动物,新增黑鳍礁鲨、玳瑁海龟、巨嘴鸟等物种,玩法更聚焦保育主题。标准版49.99美元(约人民币358元)。
